inputs.text: A stunning Korean idol-style woman with warm caramel balayage wavy shoulder-length hair, heart-shaped face, full lips, confident and powerful expression. She stands in a cherry blossom garden at blue hour twilight, petals drifting around her sequined evening gown that catches the last ambient light. Shot on 35mm lens, environmental portrait, high angle looking down creating a subtly vulnerable contrast to her fierce gaze. Negative space opens to the left revealing cascading sakura branches against deep indigo sky. Flawless porcelain skin with visible pores under soft diffused twilight, styled smoky eye makeup with glass-skin highlight. One hand rests on her collarbone, chin slightly lifted in defiance. Cinematic color grading with cool blue shadows and warm golden skin tones. Hyperrealistic, extremely detailed, no text, no watermarks.
lowres, blurry, bad anatomy, deformed, watermark, signature, extra fingers, cartoon, anime, painting
